actionable_feedback: Run [EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT] in the baseline artifacts directory and attach the produced lut_consistency_audit.csv (or its checksum) and the script stdout/stderr to the grader evidence so verifiers can reproduce end-to-end without re-running discovery steps.

Update color_memo.md and final_message.txt to remove or correct the statement that the script was not included in previews; explicitly state which checks were deterministic precheck vs. semantic grading and reconcile any semantic score claims.

Add a lightweight self-test or --verify mode to generate_lut_consistency_audit.py that asserts expected row counts and the known fail count (1) and prints a reproducible checksum (e.g., SHA256) of the generated CSV.
Include a short README (artifact README.md) with one-line instructions to run the script and the verification option, plus the expected verification outputs (row count, fail count, checksum).
After making the above changes, re-run the deterministic precheck and verifier to capture the script-run evidence and updated grader messages.
feedback_summary: Deliverables are complete and the numeric audit logic matches the memo and CSV. Two minor consistency issues were identified: the grader text incorrectly stated the reproducibility script was not present in previews, and grader/deterministic precheck messaging is inconsistent with the presence of semantic scores in the raw grader output. These are messaging/trace issues rather than numeric or algorithmic defects. Recommend adding explicit script-run evidence, a small self-check in the script, and clarifying grader/memo language.

recommended_quick_actions: Attach the script run outputs (CSV and stdout/stderr) to the attempt evidence.
Edit grader/memo text to accurately describe which checks were deterministic vs semantic and remove the incorrect 'script missing' statement.
extra_model_fields.verifier_issues_summary: Verifier noted two minor issues: (1) grader claimed the reproducibility script was not present in previews despite the script being available in artifact previews; (2) grader/deterministic precheck text claimed semantic correctness was not evaluated while raw grader outputs include semantic scores. Both are messaging/inconsistency issues to be corrected.
